title: Data Quality Status
description: Ads v1 data quality status contract for raw/clean/verified revenue measurement readiness.
$comment: Sources: PACK-07, TECH-07, and PACK-10 require Data Quality PASS before official ROAS/scale. TODO: source documents do not define a complete data quality enum or metric thresholds.

scope.description: Measurement scope such as campaign, adset, ad, channel, or period. TODO: define official scope enum.

status.description: Data quality status. TODO: define official values such as PASS/BLOCKED/PENDING if source locks them.

issues.description: Data quality issues, including missing verified revenue or attribution conflict.
